title: amitostigma basifoliatum
intro: Amitostigma basifoliatum, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Amitostigma basifoliatum include reducing inflammation, relieving cough and fever, and promoting expectoration, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
